TC_Description: Verify embedded app loads in Shopify Admin
Test Steps: Install app → Open from Shopify Admin → Apps
Expected Results: App opens in iframe without errors

TC_Description: Verify Shopify session/auth works for API calls
Test Steps: Open app → Observe app loads dashboard → Perform any action (ex: load status)
Expected Results: No 401/redirect loop; API calls succeed

TC_Description: Verify Dashboard shows shop domain and installed time
Expected Results: Shop domain + installed time visible; no blank states

Test Steps: Ensure worker running → Open Migration page
Expected Results: UI shows worker online; buttons enabled (when prerequisites met)
Banner 'Queue worker offline'; Preview/Start disabled

Test Steps: Migration → '1) Connect Shopware' → Enter valid API URL/Client ID/Secret → Save
Expected Results: Status becomes Connected; values persist after refresh
Field validation error shown; connection not saved

Test Steps: Save secret once → Refresh → Check secret field
Expected Results: Secret masked; 'Change' flow required to update
Location dropdown populated

Test Steps: Use store with no locations (or revoke permission) → Reload
Expected Results: Warning shown with guidance; Retry works after fix
Preview shows total/page; list shows sample items/issues

TC_Description: Verify Products migration start + status updates
Test Steps: Select location → Start migration → Observe status panel
Expected Results: Run created; status transitions queued→running; processed/succeeded counters increase
Run transitions to cancelled; stops processing new items
Second run skips unchanged items; UI shows 'No changes detected' banner
Preview list loads; includes sample payload details when expanded
Run created; counters update; completes successfully
Run cancelled; no further processing

Test Steps: Open customer filtered modal → choose After/Between → Preview filtered
Expected Results: Filtered total shown; errors shown for invalid dates

Test Steps: From filtered modal → Start filtered migration
Expected Results: New run starts; processes only filtered set

Test Steps: Try starting orders before products/customers complete
Expected Results: Banner indicates prerequisites; Start disabled or blocked
Preview list shows orders; expandable payload/raw/metafields
Run starts; orders created in Shopify; counters update
Run transitions cancelled; stops creating new orders

TC_Description: Verify Orders 'Migrate By Date' modal opens
Expected Results: Modal opens; mode selector + date fields visible

Test Steps: Choose 'After a date' → set date → Preview filtered
Expected Results: Filtered total displayed; no crash

Test Steps: Choose 'Between two dates' → set after+before → Preview
Expected Results: Correct filtered total; validation on invalid range

Test Steps: After preview total > 0 → Continue → Start filtered
Expected Results: Run processes only filtered orders

TC_Description: Verify Orders idempotency / no duplicates on rerun
Expected Results: Second run should not create duplicates (based on mapping/fingerprint/lookup)
Banner indicates prerequisite; Start blocked/disabled
Preview list shows recipients; expandable payload/raw
Run starts; updates customer marketing consent as expected
Run cancelled; stops processing

TC_Description: Verify 'Recent failures' UI shows meaningful messages
Test Steps: Force a failure (bad Shopware creds / invalid payload)
Expected Results: Failure list shows source_id and message (not empty)

TC_Description: Verify backend logs written for failures
Expected Results: Error includes run_id, shop, source_id, reason

TC_Description: Verify Shopify GraphQL throttle debug logging toggle (off)
Test Steps: Ensure debug env false → run a few items
Expected Results: No verbose cost/throttle logs

TC_Description: Verify Shopify GraphQL throttle debug logging toggle (on)
Expected Results: Logs include GraphQL cost + throttleStatus info
No runaway delays; rate limit handled; expected slower speed

Test Steps: Set SHOPIFY_ORDER_MIN_INTERVAL_SECONDS=0 and increase concurrency gradually
Expected Results: No artificial 12s pacing; speed improves until Shopify throttles

TC_Description: Verify retry handling on HTTP 429 + Retry-After
Expected Results: Job releases with Retry-After delay; resumes correctly

TC_Description: Verify handling of Shopify 'Too many attempts' userErrors
Expected Results: Job re-queues with bounded delay; no infinite rapid failures

Test Steps: Ensure SHOPIFY_ORDER_CACHE_STORE=file → run multiple order jobs
Expected Results: Lock serializes orderCreate; no concurrency collisions

TC_Description: Verify worker restart does not break active run state
Test Steps: Start a run → restart worker → observe
Expected Results: Run continues (queued/running) without data corruption

TC_Description: Verify UI disables Start while run is active
Expected Results: Start disabled; Cancel enabled

TC_Description: Verify input validation for date fields
Test Steps: Open 'Migrate By Date' → set invalid date or before<after issues
Expected Results: Clear error/toast shown; migration not started

TC_Description: Verify security: secrets not printed in UI
Expected Results: Secret never displayed in plain text

TC_Description: Verify security: logs do not contain Shopware secrets
Test Steps: Trigger connection save and migrations → inspect logs
Expected Results: No client_secret value printed

Test Steps: Complete a small run → compare Shopify created entities count
Expected Results: Succeeded count aligns with created items
No new Shopify objects created by preview
